description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
Highlights
This build fixes an installer bug that was caused by the latest API update.
What's Changed
- Simplify transformerlab api sdk by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/418
- Fixed dropdown dark mode background by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/434
- If Plugin install fails, show a message by @dadmobile in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/430
- Remove unneeded API call on startup by @dadmobile in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/435
- Split up transformerlab-api-sdk into components by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/438
- Add/first-example-of-using-new-sdk by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/441
- Added input field to CSS by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/437
- All exporter plugins showing 'Exporting...' when one runs by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/442
- Fix info icon for training jobs by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/445
- Change key dependency name to transformerlab-inference to fix broken installer by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/446
New Contributors
- @aahaanmaini made their first contribution in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/434
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.15.1...v0.15.2
